---
title: IT Security Review
start_month: 9
end_month: 9
category: IT
responsible: IT Manager
priority: high
tags: [security, compliance]
---

Annual review of IT security posture and internal controls.

## Activities

- Audit access rights and user account lifecycle
- Test backup integrity and disaster recovery procedures
- Update the IT incident response plan
- Run phishing simulation and security awareness training for all staff

## Outputs

- Updated security assessment report
- Remediation backlog with owners and due dates
